{{Quote|Your mother hated the Jedi as much as the Emperor ever did, and she would have relished hunting them down.|[[Isolder]] speaking to his mother, [[Ta'a Chume]]|<ref name="CoPL">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>}}
'''Ni'Korish''' was a [[Hapan]] [[Queen Mother]] whose reign coincided with the early part of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] rule in the wider [[Galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]].<ref name="CoPL" />

She was known for her extreme [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|anti-Jedi sentiments]],<ref name="CoPL" /><ref name="JE">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref><ref name="DJ">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''</ref> regarding them as a closed elite who monopolised power through their magic,<ref name="JE" /> and her grandson [[Isolder]] believed that if any [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] had tried to hide in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Jedi Purge]], she would have enjoyed destroying them.<ref name="CoPL" />

Ni'Korish had [[Ni'Korish's younger daughters|several daughters]], including [[Ta'a Chume]], who succeeded her as ruler, and [[Secciah]].<ref name="CoPL" /> Because of her opposition to the Jedi, she gave her name to a [[Ni'Korish (faction)|clandestine faction]] which rose to prominence on Hapes during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], opposed to renewed Jedi influence, and specifically to the succession of Ta'a Chume's [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] granddaughter [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]].<ref name="DJ" />
